---
id: cancel-using-put
title: "Cancel application"
description: "Requires <b>applications.cancel</b> authority for authenticated user"
sidebar_label: "Cancel application"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/api/eshopReference/hc-oneclick-api-installments
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Cancel application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/financing/v1/applications/{uuid}/cancel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.cancel</b> authority for authenticated user

If there is need to completely cancel customer's order, it is necessary to cancel respective 
*application*. For this purpose use `/financing/v1/applications/{applicationId}/cancel` 
resource where `{applicationId}` is the *application* ID you received in the response of 
`/financing/v1/applications` after its creation.

| Financing type | Supported            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| `INSTALLMENT`         | YES  |


| Application state | Availability            |
| ----------- | --------------- |
| `REJECTED`         | YES  |
| `CANCELED`         | YES  |
| `PROCESSING`         | YES  |
| `READY`         | YES  |

If the request was successfully processed but the application had been already paid 
(`Application.stateReason = READY_PAID`) you receive HTTP status code **202 ACCEPTED** 
that means the process of a cancelation of the *application* began. It SHOULD be 
completed after fulfilment of several back office manual actions.

In other cases, when the request is successfully processed, you receive HTTP status code **200 OK**.

You also receive at least following information about (soon to be) cancelled application in the response:

- Application unique ID
- Application type
- Application state
- Application substate

In other cases, you receive one of the following errors:

| Status code | Code            | Explanation          |
| ----------- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| 400         | INVALID_REQUEST  | Request was not well formatted (malformed request syntax, size too large, etc.) |
| 404         | OBJECT_NOT_FOUND  | The requested resource could not be found |
| 422         | NOT_SUPPORTED | Resource is not supported for given financing type |
| 422         | UNPROCESSABLE | The request was well-formed but was unable to be followed due to semantic errors |
| 422         | APPLICATION_REJECTED | When you try to cancel already `REJECTED` `Application`, which is not allowed |
| 500         | INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Unexpected condition was encountered and no more specific message is suitable |


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"uuid","in":"path","description":"uuid","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customReason":{"type":"string","description":"Specification of APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER reason"},"reason":{"type":"string","description":"Reason of cancellation. Considered as APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER if not set.","enum":["APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CARRIER_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_CART_CONTENT_CHANGED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_CUSTOMER","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ERP","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_EXPIRED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_UNFINISHED","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_BY_ESHOP_RULES","APPLICATION_CANCELLED_OTHER"]}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationCancelRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
